project_root_runs: runs/dcortex (created under repo: checkpoints/, logs/, dataset_cache/bin/, results/, configs/)

model_package.compat_verified: Repo model exposes every method/attribute the v11 training loop calls (verified by grep on 2026-06-15).

reference_training_script.notes: Highest-numbered colab/step2_training_v*.py (v11, 3043 lines). Inlines a copy of the model source and writes it to disk (write_source) then imports from dcortex package. Mounts Google Drive. A100/cap>=8 branch already selects bf16+no GradScaler.

scripts/verify_env_local.py.purpose: Gate 1 ENV: assert torch.cuda.is_available(), capability (12,0), run a real bf16 cuda matmul, print torch/cuda versions.
scripts/verify_env_local.py.verified: PASS on 2026-06-15: torch 2.11.0+cu128, cap 12.0, bf16 4096x4096 matmul OK.

colab/train_local.py.purpose: Adapted single-GPU Windows training script. Drops Drive mount and inline write_source, imports real dcortex package, local PROJECT_ROOT, local E:\DATA LM corpus tokenizer, bf16+no GradScaler, gradient checkpointing on decoder StandardTransformerBlock, atomic _step_ checkpoints (os.replace, Windows-atomic) with numeric-sort resume + RNG + loss_history, OOM guard, aggregate train_loss series, peak VRAM tracking, run_meta JSON.
colab/train_local.py.verified: 300-step run on 2026-06-15: loss 11.79->3.08, peak VRAM 3.234 GB, 0 OOM, ckpts 100/200/300. Resume reproduces trajectory bit-identically.
windows_fixes: os.replace instead of os.rename for atomic checkpoint write
num_workers not used (no DataLoader for memmap)

scripts/emit_verdict.py.purpose: Verifier: reads run_meta + loss_history artifacts, re-checks ENV live, evaluates 4 gates (ENV/FIT/LEARNS/RESUME), writes results/verdict.json and results/loss_curve.png. Generation/verification separated.

run_artifacts.runs/dcortex/: main 300-step run: checkpoints/ (step 100/200/300), results/loss_history.json, results/run_meta_main.json, results/verdict.json, results/loss_curve.png, dataset_cache/bin/byon_{train,val}.bin, configs/train_config.json
run_artifacts.runs/dcortex_resume/: dedicated RESUME gate run (phase1 fresh->100, phase2 resume->150)

verification_gates.ENV: cuda available + capability (12,0) + real cuda matmul
verification_gates.FIT: measured peak VRAM over a real 50-step run < 15 GB
verification_gates.LEARNS: final train loss < initial by >= 15% over 300 steps; report initial/final/min/median/max
verification_gates.RESUME: stop after a checkpoint, restart, resume from correct step with continuous loss
